lineItems.description: Program Coordinator (0.2 FTE) — cohort management, pod assignments, weekly check-ins, coaching DM review
lineItems.notes: $50,000 annual salary at 20% time allocation; manages 3 cohorts per year (Jan, May, Sep)

lineItems.description: Pod facilitator stipends — volunteer facilitators for role-based pods
lineItems.notes: $250 per facilitator x 4 facilitators x 3 cohorts; facilitators lead weekly pod meetings

lineItems.description: Notion workspace — program tracker database, weekly logs, progress dashboards
lineItems.notes: Notion Plus plan for team workspace; shared across all WBB programs

lineItems.description: Mock interview platform — Pramp, Interviewing.io, or equivalent subscriptions
lineItems.notes: $800 per cohort for premium mock interview access for participants

lineItems.description: Zoom Pro — virtual pod meetings and coaching sessions
lineItems.notes: Shared organizational subscription; allocated portion for Bridge sessions

lineItems.description: DSA and interview prep resources — LeetCode Premium group licenses, system design materials
lineItems.notes: $600 per cohort for group licenses and curated study materials

lineItems.description: Community events — kickoff socials, mid-program check-ins, graduation celebrations (3 cohorts)
lineItems.notes: $800 per cohort; mix of virtual and in-person events

lineItems.description: Guest speaker honoraria — industry professionals for interview workshops and panels
lineItems.notes: $500 per cohort for 2 guest speakers each

lineItems.description: Recruitment and outreach — social media campaigns, Slack announcements, email marketing
lineItems.notes: $400 per cohort for targeted ads and promotional materials

lineItems.description: Administrative overhead — program reporting, accounting, communications
